name: Is it harder to get cited by Siri in bigger cities?
description: Usually yes, because larger markets have more competition and more confusing local signals.

mainEntity.name: Is it harder to get cited by Siri in bigger cities?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you are in a competitive market like New York or Dallas-Fort Worth, the bar for clear entity signals is higher because more businesses are competing for the same query. Clean local relevance, precise service wording, and well-maintained listings become more important. Siri is more likely to surface the source that is easiest to match with the user’s intent.
acceptedAnswer.description: Usually yes, because larger markets have more competition and more confusing local signals.
